name: agent-orchestration
description: Multi-agent orchestration skills for Claude Code: decompose coding work into parallel executor agents, route tasks to models (Haiku 4.5 / Sonnet 5 / Opus 4.8), pick reasoning effort, write closed task prompts, and review executor results. Fable 5 and Opus 4.8 orchestrator variants. Grounded in Anthropic system cards.
